metadata.name: SMS Phishing (Smishing) Dataset
metadata.description: Curated SMS phishing (smishing) and legitimate SMS samples. Derived from the UCI SMS Spam Collection and academic smishing research datasets.

sources.name: UCI SMS Spam Collection Dataset
sources.description: Collection of 5,574 SMS messages (4,827 legitimate, 747 spam/phishing). Widely used benchmark for SMS spam classification. Collected from the Grumbletext UK forum and NUS SMS Corpus.
sources.citation: Almeida, T.A., Gómez Hidalgo, J.M., & Yamakami, A. (2011). Contributions to the study of SMS Spam Filtering: New Collection and Results. DocEng 2011.

sources.name: SmiShing Dataset (Misra et al.)
sources.description: Extended SMS smishing dataset focusing on mobile phishing targeting banking, delivery, and government services.
sources.citation: Misra, S. et al. (2021). Smishing dataset for machine learning research. IEEE Access.

sources.name: Sms-phishing Dataset (Bergholz et al.)
sources.description: SMS phishing samples targeting UK financial institutions, parcel delivery services, and HMRC.

feature_vocabulary.description: Top smishing indicator terms from frequency analysis of the UCI SMS Spam Collection and Misra datasets.

samples.text: Congratulations! You've been selected to receive a FREE £500 Tesco voucher. Txt CLAIM to 82277 to redeem. T&Cs apply. Reply STOP to opt out.
samples.label: smishing

samples.text: URGENT: Your parcel from Royal Mail is being held at the depot. A customs fee of £1.99 is required before delivery. Pay now: bit.ly/RM-customs
samples.label: smishing

samples.label: smishing

samples.label: smishing

samples.label: smishing

samples.text: WINNER!! As a valued network customer u have been selected to receive a £900 prize reward! Please call 09061701461 to claim NOW. T&C www.t-c.biz 150p/min.
samples.label: smishing

samples.text: DPD: Delivery attempt failed. Your parcel requires a £2.49 redelivery fee. Rebook at: dpd-redeliver.co.uk/pay within 24hrs.
samples.label: smishing

samples.text: HSBC ALERT: Unusual transaction of £847.00 detected on your account ending 4421. If not you, call 0808-XXX-XXXX or visit hsbc-fraud.co.uk
samples.label: smishing
red_flags: Partial card number to seem legitimate

samples.text: Ur mobile no. been selected to receive a FREE gift. Reply YES or call 08714712412 now
samples.label: smishing

samples.text: Sky: Your monthly payment of £47 could not be processed. Your services will be suspended in 24hrs. Update payment: sky-billing.co.uk
samples.label: smishing

samples.label: smishing

samples.text: Had your Loan Payment been declined? Our advisors can help. Now get a personal loan in less than 24hrs. Call 0203 XXX XXXX.
samples.label: smishing

samples.text: Lloyds: Your account has been locked following 3 failed login attempts. Unlock now: lloyds-unlock.co.uk/verify
samples.label: smishing

samples.text: IMPORTANT - U Have been awarded a £2000 Bonus Caller Prize to claim call 09050003091 from land line. Expires 12/04/26.
samples.label: smishing
red_flags: Landline-only restriction (to exclude mobiles from complaints)

samples.text: Evri: Your parcel (tracking: EV93847211) is ready for collection. A £3.49 customs clearance fee applies. Pay at: evri-customs.co.uk
samples.label: smishing

samples.text: Your NI number has been compromised and will be suspended. To prevent this, call HMRC immediately: 0800-XXX-XXXX or visit: ni-protect.co.uk
samples.label: smishing

samples.text: You are a winner of the 2026 UK National Lottery draw! Prize: £500,000. To claim, send your full name and bank details to claims@lotterydraw.co.uk
samples.label: smishing
red_flags: You can't win a lottery you didn't enter

samples.text: BARCLAYS: We've detected a login from a new device (iPhone 13, Manchester). If this wasn't you, verify: barclays-secure-login.com
samples.label: smishing
red_flags: Fake device/location detail to seem credible

samples.text: Get ur free cash prize of £500 by texting CASH to 87070. T&C apply. 150p per msg. Reply STOP to opt out. 18+ UK only.
samples.label: smishing

samples.text: URGENT: Your TV Licence has expired. A warrant has been issued for your address. Pay now to avoid prosecution: tvl-payment.co.uk
samples.label: smishing

samples.text: HALIFAX: Your online banking password has been changed. If this wasn't you, call 0800-XXX-XXXX or click: halifax-alert.co.uk
samples.label: smishing

samples.text: Hi babe, I won't be able to make it tonight. Something came up with mum. Call me when you can. Xx
samples.label: legitimate

samples.text: Your Tesco order is on its way! Estimated delivery: today between 2pm-6pm. Track at tesco.com/delivery
samples.label: legitimate

samples.text: Your GP appointment is confirmed for Tuesday 18 March at 11:00am at Northfields Surgery. Reply NO to cancel.
samples.label: legitimate

samples.text: Hey, are you coming to Paul's birthday on Saturday? Let me know if you need the address!
samples.label: legitimate

samples.text: Amazon: Your order #114-9384720 has been dispatched. Expected delivery: tomorrow. Track at amazon.co.uk/orders
samples.label: legitimate

samples.text: Just landed! Can you pick me up from Heathrow Terminal 2 at around 8pm? My phone's on low battery.
samples.label: legitimate

samples.text: Reminder: Your car service is booked for Monday 17 March at 9am at Kwik Fit Hammersmith. Call 020-XXXX-XXXX to rearrange.
samples.label: legitimate

samples.text: Your Barclays card ending 4892 was used for £42.50 at Sainsbury's Hammersmith at 14:32. Not you? Call the number on the back of your card.
samples.label: legitimate
legitimacy_signals: Instructs to call number on card (not a link)

samples.text: Running 10 mins late, traffic on the M25. Start without me if you need to.
samples.label: legitimate

samples.text: Your NatWest 2-step verification code is: 847291. Do not share this code with anyone. We will never ask for this code.
samples.label: legitimate
legitimacy_signals: Bank explicitly says they won't ask for code

samples.text: Don't forget we're having dinner with Mum and Dad on Sunday 7pm. Can you pick up some wine on the way?
samples.label: legitimate

samples.text: Your Hermes parcel (K39847211) is out for delivery today. Track here: myhermes.co.uk/track
samples.label: legitimate

samples.text: Hi Tom, just checking you're still okay for the meeting at 3pm? The Zoom link is in the calendar invite.
samples.label: legitimate
legitimacy_signals: Reference to calendar invite (not a new link)

samples.text: EE: Your monthly bill of £32.00 is ready to view. Log in at ee.co.uk/myaccount to pay.
samples.label: legitimate
legitimacy_signals: Directs to main site for payment

samples.text: School closes at 2pm today due to staff training. Please arrange collection before 2pm. Contact office on 020-XXXX-XXXX.
samples.label: legitimate

samples.text: Your Deliveroo order from Wagamama is on its way! Estimated arrival: 25 mins. Track on the Deliveroo app.
samples.label: legitimate

samples.text: FREE Msg: You've been selected for our prize programme! To claim £250 cash txt PRIZE to 80988 now! 50p/msg T&C apply.
samples.label: smishing

samples.text: HMRC: You have an unpaid tax bill of £1,492. This will be passed to debt collectors unless paid in 24hrs. Pay: hmrc-debt.co.uk
samples.label: smishing

samples.text: Claim a £200 Marks & Spencer voucher just for completing a short survey. Answer 4 quick questions: mands-reward.co.uk
samples.label: smishing

samples.text: SANTANDER: We have placed a temporary hold on your account. To release the hold, verify your identity: santander-verify.co.uk
samples.label: smishing

samples.text: Your Amazon account has been used to place an order for an iPad for £649. To cancel, visit: amzn-cancel.net/order
samples.label: smishing

samples.text: VODAFONE: Your contract is up for renewal. As a loyal customer, you are eligible for a FREE iPhone 15. Claim: voda-upgrade.co.uk
samples.label: smishing

samples.text: POLICE: Your vehicle has been detected in a 20mph zone at 34mph. A Fixed Penalty Notice of £100 is due. Pay: police-fines.co.uk
samples.label: smishing
red_flags: Police don't send fines via SMS
Specific speed/zone detail to seem credible

samples.text: IMPORTANT: Your mortgage payment of £1,102 failed. Contact your lender immediately to avoid repossession: mortgage-help.co.uk
samples.label: smishing

samples.text: Your Netflix password was recently changed. If this wasn't you, secure your account: netflix-security.co.uk
samples.label: smishing

samples.text: COUNCIL TAX: A court order has been issued against you for unpaid council tax. Contact us immediately to avoid bailiff action: council-debt.co.uk
samples.label: smishing
red_flags: Council tax agencies don't SMS court orders
